name: Tianxia Realm: A Xianxia RPG
description:
‎Step into the Tianxia Realm

A world where qi condenses into floating rivers, ancient sects clash over divine relics, and every choice shifts the balance between Heaven, Demon, and Beast. Will you follow the righteous Zenith Sect, embrace the ruthless Dark Blood Sect, or ally with the primal Ironclad Beast Tribe? Your new cultivation adventure begins in this Xianxia-inspired world!


Three Paths of Power:
• Heaven: Seek enlightenment through celestial harmony (but beware of the cost of dogma).
• Demon: Harness destructive power (though corruption may claim your soul).
• Beast: Merge with the wild (at the risk of losing your humanity).

Major Sects:
• Zenith Sect (Heaven path)
• Dark Blood Sect (Demon path)
• Ironclad Beast Tribe (Beast path)

Dynamic Narration & Interaction:
• The bot responds to your actions—when you quote actions like “meditate/cultivate,” "status", “fight,” or “explore”—with consequences tailored to your path.
• Ask “choices” to receive 2-3 context-aware options when uncertain.
• You can also ask it to display your "status." It will show your HP, Qi, Realm, Inventory, and so on.

Key Locations:
• Verdant Highlands - A lightning-scarred wilderness teeming with mythical, lightning-based spirit beasts.
• Ashen Abyss - A demonic wasteland, home to fire-type spirit beasts—some even swim in volcanic lava.
• Jade Dragon City - The largest neutral city in Tianxia, built at the confluence of several major Qi Rivers. A sprawling metropolis with districts reflecting various influences.
• The Silent Pagoda - Mysterious, impossibly tall ancient tower filled with trials. Origin unknown.
• Dragonbone Caves - A labyrinthine cave system within a colossal, petrified dragon's skeleton, amplifying Qi.
• Sunken Shrine of Whispering Tides - Ruined temple complex submerged in a tranquil lake, resonating with celestial energy.
• Vault of Echoing Souls - Ancient vault hidden within a mountain, guarded by spirits and formations, containing relics from a lost civilization.

MORTAL REALM

  1. Qi Refinement
    "Sense the world's breath; fists crack stone."
    Perceive spiritual energy; leap across rooftops, punch through solid iron.

  2. Foundation Establishment
    "Meridians blaze like rivers; sweat becomes poison to lesser beings."
    Survive great falls unharmed, shatter siege weapons with bare hands, resist common poisons.

  3. Golden Core
    "A miniature sun burns within; storms pause at your gaze."
    Achieve temporary flight, freeze lakes solid, endure the heat of volcanic flows.

  4. Nascent Soul
    "Your soul walks beside you, a nascent god carved from will."
    Project an avatar miles away, summon regional typhoons, level fortresses with focused power.

  5. Soul Formation
    "Mountains feel diminutive beneath your gaze."
    Teleport across provinces, manifest multiple tangible clones, divert large rivers with gestures.
